name: 24/7 Golf Performance
about: 24/7 Golf Performance Center is a golf training and simulation facility that combines technology with physical fitness. The venue features Uneekor simulators, a golf fitness area, and two large indoor putting greens, available for 24-hour access to clients in their coaching program. Their services include structured programs like the Foundation Program and Ladies 101, focusing on beginner to recreational players, along with Body/Swing Assessments using TPI & FGS video analysis and Brain Body Intelligence coaching methods. Pricing is offered through a membership model with specific coaching packages.
why_golfers_like_it: 24-hour access to facility and Uneekor technology for flexible practice schedules
Integration of fitness training with golf coaching to prevent injuries and maximize performance
Use of high-definition Uneekor simulators with GSPRO software to play world-famous courses

simulator_hardware.notes: High-definition simulators with GSPRO software for course play.

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The facility can help you pick out a set of clubs if you don't have one, and lessons cover how to organize your bag.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, so it is assumed outside food and drinks are not allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It is possible to play 18 holes in 1.5 hours using the simulators.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The facility offers birthday party rentals and has a Ladies 101 program, suggesting a family-friendly environment, but specific kid-friendly amenities are not detailed.
